note: Hand-entered Boston Memorial Day weekend events (May 23-25, 2026). Confirm details on each venue's site before going.

events.title: Memorial Day Flag Garden on Boston Common
events.description: 37,000+ flags planted by the Massachusetts Military Heroes at the Soldiers and Sailors Monument — each flag represents a Massachusetts service member who died defending the country since the Revolutionary War. On display through sundown Monday May 25.
events.venue: Boston Common, Soldiers and Sailors Monument

events.title: Memorial Day Flag Garden on Boston Common
events.description: 37,000+ flags planted at the Soldiers and Sailors Monument honoring Massachusetts service members who died defending the country since the Revolutionary War.
events.venue: Boston Common, Soldiers and Sailors Monument

events.title: Memorial Day Flag Garden on Boston Common
events.description: Final day of the Flag Garden display — 37,000+ flags at the Soldiers and Sailors Monument honoring Massachusetts service members. Removed at sundown.
events.venue: Boston Common, Soldiers and Sailors Monument

events.title: Seaport Memorial Day Parade
events.description: Memorial Day parade along Northern Avenue from Fan Pier Boulevard to Seaport Boulevard.

events.title: Dorchester Memorial Day Parade
events.description: Memorial Day parade beginning at the McKeon Post, 4 Hilltop Street in Dorchester.
